task_completion.description: Verify the diagram includes the host input chains with 4 microphones, 4 Cloudlifters, and the mixer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 4 'Shure SM7B' nodes connected to 4 'Cloudlifter CL-1' nodes, which are then connected to 1 'RodeCaster Pro II' node. The connection lines must have directional arrows pointing towards the mixer and be labeled 'XLR'.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram shows the output monitoring connection from the mixer to the studio monitors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'RodeCaster Pro II' node connected to 'Yamaha HS8' monitor node(s) (accept either 1 or 2 monitor nodes). The connection line must have a directional arrow pointing to the monitors and be labeled 'TRS'.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram shows the headphone monitoring chain from the mixer to the headphone amp and headphones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'RodeCaster Pro II' node connected to 1 'Behringer HA8000' node, which is then connected to 4 'Sony Headphones' nodes. The connection lines must have directional arrows pointing towards the headphones and be labeled 'TRS'.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram shows the recording interface connection from the mixer to the Studio PC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'RodeCaster Pro II' node connected to a 'Studio PC' node. The connection line must have a directional arrow pointing to the PC and be labeled 'USB-C'.

task_completion.description: Verify the source .drawio file and exported .png file were saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'studio_signal_flow.drawio' and 'studio_signal_flow.png' icons on the Desktop, or verify their paths in a file manager, terminal, or save dialog.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io (diagrams.net) application window should be visible with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than the agent writing XML code in a text editor to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify the PNG export was performed via the draw.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io 'Export as' dialog or file menu being used, and ensure the final PNG visually matches the diagram constructed on the canvas.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually constructed the diagram step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progressive building of the diagram (adding nodes, drawing lines, typing labels) over time, rather than a completed diagram instantly appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly: 4 microphones, 4 cloudlifters, 1 mixer (RodeCaster Pro II), 1 PC, 1 headphone amp (Behringer HA8000), 4 headphones, and Yamaha HS8 monitors (inventory specifies 2 monitors, but accept 1 or 2). Cable labels must be 'XLR' for mic chains, 'TRS' for monitoring/headphones, and 'USB-C' for the PC connection. Expected output files are /home/ga/Desktop/studio_signal_flow.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/studio_signal_flow.png.
